title: SepsiSim: Gymnasium Environments for Reinforcement Learning in Sepsis Management

existing_packages.name: icu-sepsis
existing_packages.approach: Tabular MDP from discretized MIMIC-III data
existing_packages.limitations: Discrete states/actions, no physiological dynamics, static transition matrix

gap_analysis.gap_filled: Continuous-state ODE-based physiological simulation with 3 graduated environments
novelty: First Gymnasium-compatible continuous-state sepsis RL environments
Multi-system integration: inflammation + cardiovascular + lactate + SOFA
Three graduated environments for curriculum learning

FluidResuscitation-v0.challenge: Restore MAP while avoiding fluid overload

SepsisManagement-v0.challenge: Balance fluids, vasopressors, and antibiotic timing

physiological_models.inflammation: Reynolds et al. 2006 - 4-ODE system (bacteria, pro-inflammatory, anti-inflammatory, tissue damage)
physiological_models.cardiovascular: Lumped-parameter hemodynamic model with Frank-Starling saturation

author: Hass Dhia
